description: Signal extraction validation set for ESC market calibration
methodology: Documents sourced from IPART/Ecovantage archives and known ESS policy events. Actual price changes computed from esc_reconstruction.csv. Expected signal directions based on documented policy impact analysis.

documents.title: ESS Rule 2009 Amendment No. 8 — Administrative updates
documents.description: Administrative updates to activity definitions. No material supply/demand impact expected.

documents.title: COVID-19 ESS flexibility measures
documents.description: Temporary relaxation of installation requirements due to COVID-19. Reduced installer activity expected to cut supply short-term.

documents.title: Commercial lighting baseline change Phase 1
documents.description: Reduced deemed savings for commercial lighting upgrades. Fewer ESCs per installation, reducing supply growth.

documents.title: ESS Rule 2009 Amendment No. 10 — HEER expansion
documents.description: New HEER activity definitions expanding residential scope. Opens new supply pathways but also increases demand through broader scheme coverage.

documents.title: Commercial lighting phase-down accelerated
documents.description: Further reduction in commercial lighting deemed savings. Major supply contraction as CL was ~38% of creation volume.

documents.title: IPART statutory review of ESS commenced
documents.description: Review of ESS scheme design and surplus management. Market uncertainty about outcome.

documents.title: IPART surplus management consultation paper
documents.description: Consultation on mechanisms to address growing surplus. Potential for supply restrictions or demand increases.

documents.title: Safeguard Mechanism reforms commenced
documents.description: Increased corporate focus on certificate compliance. Cross-scheme demand driver expected to increase ESC demand indirectly.

documents.title: Revised ESC targets — Schedule 5 update
documents.description: Increased annual ESC targets to reduce surplus overhang. Direct demand increase mechanism.

documents.title: NABERS integration pilot
documents.description: Pilot linking NABERS ratings to ESC creation eligibility. Neutral short-term impact.

documents.title: PEAK demand reduction scheme expansion
documents.description: PRC scheme expansion increasing certificate demand across energy schemes.

documents.title: IPART ESS Rule review for 2027 compliance year
documents.description: Creation method changes for 2027 compliance year. Affects method eligibility and deemed savings calculations.
documents.note: Beyond reconstruction data range — future event

documents.title: ESS doorknocking ban enforcement
documents.description: Ban on door-to-door ESS activity solicitation. Reduces residential retrofit installation volume.
documents.note: Beyond reconstruction data range — future event

documents.title: IHEAB monthly reporting requirement
documents.description: Mandatory monthly reporting for IHEAB activities. Increases administrative burden, may slow creation velocity.
documents.note: Beyond reconstruction data range — future event

documents.title: SONA method end date
documents.description: SONA (Sale of New Appliances) method ceases. Removes one creation pathway, reducing supply.
documents.note: Beyond reconstruction data range — future event

documents.title: HEER heat pump warranty requirement
documents.description: Mandatory extended warranty requirements for HEER heat pump installations. Increases cost per activity, may reduce installation volume.
documents.note: Beyond reconstruction data range — future event

documents.title: Commercial lighting (CLESF) method end date
documents.description: Complete end of commercial lighting ESC creation. Removes ~25% of total creation volume.
documents.note: Genuine observation ESC=$24.50 at 2026-04-03 is shortly after this event

documents.title: F8/F9 gas boiler activity end date
documents.description: Gas boiler replacement activities (F8/F9) cease. Additional supply pathway removal.
documents.note: Beyond reconstruction data range — future event

documents.title: Ecovantage market update — ESC supply tightening noted
documents.description: Weekly market update noting supply tightening and accelerating CL phase-down impact. Bullish outlook with rising creation costs.

documents.title: Ecovantage market update — surplus overhang concerns
documents.description: Weekly update highlighting growing surplus and bearish price outlook. Surplus exceeds annual demand.

documents.title: Ecovantage market update — price softening
documents.description: Weekly update noting continued price softening and surplus accumulation despite target increases.

documents.title: Ecovantage Market Update 02 April 2026
documents.description: Latest weekly market update — ESC at $24.50 post CLESF method end.
documents.note: Genuine price observation from live scraper

documents.title: COVID-19 second wave restrictions — NSW
documents.description: Second wave COVID restrictions impacting installer access. Installation activity slowed across NSW.

documents.title: ESS target increase — 2023 compliance year
documents.description: Annual ESC target increase from 5.5M to 5.8M certificates. Demand increase mechanism.

documents.title: ESS target increase — 2022 compliance year
documents.description: Annual ESC target increase from 5.2M to 5.5M certificates. Combined with CL phase-down creates tightening pressure.
